details.test: Task 1: Request home hospice consultation within next 5 days
Task 2: Find inpatient hospice facility near ZIP and read visiting hours
Task 3: Choose between Hospice Care and Palliative Care based on support features
Task 4: Register for earliest online evening caregiver support group on/after July 1
Task 5: Estimate 7-day home palliative care cost with Medicare and daily cost <= 200
Task 6: Create caregiver account and save preferred hospice location
Task 7: Generate and email symptom conversation guide for SOB and nausea
Task 8: Make one-time 75 donation to Pediatric Hospice Fund in honor of Maria Lopez
Task 9: Request free mailed bilingual end-of-life planning guide for caregivers
